title: eriosema kankolo subsp. lanceolatum
intro: Eriosema kankolo subsp. lanceolatum is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is a shrub-like herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its numerous health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
